---
title: White Space
slug: white-space
type: post
status: draft
category: Exhibition
tags: [gallery, sculpture]
heroImage: 05-white-space.jpg
excerpt: "Documentation of a year-long sculpture exhibition in a converted warehouse gallery."
---

A long-form documentation project covering twelve months of a single sculpture exhibition. Eight artists, one space, fifty visits — the goal was to capture the gallery's rhythm rather than its content.
